categories.name: Problem Solving & Technical Expertise
categories.description: Recognition for individuals or teams who demonstrate exceptional skill in identifying, diagnosing, and resolving complex issues, often involving technical knowledge, critical thinking, and efficient execution.

subcategories.name: Issue Resolution & Fixes
subcategories.description: Acknowledging individuals who quickly and effectively address and fix problems, bugs, or errors, ensuring minimal disruption and smooth operations.
examples: found the source of the problem and quickly managed to prep the hotfix
helped in resolving the Revenue Recognition data population issues

subcategories.name: Technical Contribution & Innovation
subcategories.description: Highlighting contributions that involve deep technical knowledge, developing new solutions, or significantly improving existing systems and processes.
examples: building brand-new components
Automated Translations innovation will make a meaningful difference

subcategories.name: Expert Guidance & Troubleshooting
subcategories.description: Recognizing those who provide expert advice, troubleshoot difficult situations, and share their knowledge to help others overcome technical challenges.
examples: Your deep knowledge and expertise, you're the person everyone turns to
helped me to better understand the most common integration issues

categories.name: Collaboration & Teamwork
categories.description: Praise for individuals and groups who actively contribute to a positive team environment, support colleagues, and work effectively together to achieve shared goals.

subcategories.name: Mutual Support & Assistance
subcategories.description: Acknowledging those who consistently offer help, support, and assistance to their colleagues, making work easier and more efficient for others.
examples: you never hesitate to give up your time to help me
always offering a helping hand

subcategories.name: Team Project Success
subcategories.description: Recognizing collective efforts and successful outcomes achieved through strong teamwork and collaboration on specific projects or initiatives.
examples: incredible collaboration over the past few months
your hard work, dedication and teamwork throughout 2025

subcategories.name: Positive Team Environment
subcategories.description: Highlighting individuals who contribute to a positive, energetic, and supportive team atmosphere, fostering morale and camaraderie.
examples: positive energy you've brought throughout the year
bring the BEST energy into every room

categories.name: Client & Customer Focus
categories.description: Recognition for individuals and teams who go above and beyond to ensure excellent customer experiences, manage client relationships effectively, and deliver value to external stakeholders.

subcategories.name: Exceptional Client Partnership
subcategories.description: Praising individuals who build strong relationships with clients, act as trusted partners, and consistently deliver outstanding service and value.
examples: You are such a wonderful partner to your clients
amazing partnership - not just for the recent company meeting, but all the support throughout the year

subcategories.name: Customer Experience Enhancement
subcategories.description: Acknowledging efforts that directly improve the customer experience, solve customer issues, or ensure customer satisfaction.
examples: ensuring our customers experience is at the forefront of every interaction
providing our customers with the best possible experience

subcategories.name: Client Deliverables & Success
subcategories.description: Recognizing contributions that lead to the successful delivery of client projects, meeting client needs, and achieving positive client outcomes.
examples: enabled us to make meaningful progress on a client deliverable
successfully delivering the Budget Management 2.0 fix for TechCorp

categories.name: Initiative & Proactivity
categories.description: Awards for individuals who take ownership, act independently, anticipate needs, and drive tasks forward without explicit instruction, demonstrating a strong work ethic and commitment.

subcategories.name: Taking Ownership & Driving Action
subcategories.description: Highlighting individuals who proactively take responsibility for tasks and see them through to completion, often in challenging circumstances.
examples: take ownership of the problem, driving home the fix
you immediately rolled up your sleeves and put all old and

subcategories.name: Anticipating Needs & Proactive Support
subcategories.description: Recognizing those who foresee potential issues or needs and take action in advance, providing support or solutions before being asked.
examples: Your proactive approach and willingness to collaborate
your support as I took a few days off

subcategories.name: Stepping Up & Going Above and Beyond
subcategories.description: Praising individuals who consistently go the extra mile, take on additional responsibilities, or perform tasks outside their usual scope.
examples: Thank you for stepping up and keeping momentum strong
willingness to go above and beyond to ensure everything was up and running smoothly

categories.name: Leadership & Mentorship
categories.description: Recognition for individuals who guide, inspire, and develop others, demonstrating strong leadership qualities and a commitment to fostering growth in their colleagues.

subcategories.name: Mentorship & Guidance
subcategories.description: Acknowledging individuals who provide valuable advice, share knowledge, and guide the development of others, helping them grow professionally.
examples: best mentor I could ask for
all your mentorship and leadership this last sprint
create opportunities for those around you that unlock their individual greatness
helping direct our teams in the right direction

subcategories.name: Personal Attributes & Drive
subcategories.description: Awards for outstanding personal qualities, dedication, and a strong work ethic that positively impacts the workplace.

subcategories.name: Dedication & Commitment
subcategories.description: Highlighting individuals who show exceptional commitment, perseverance, and a strong drive to achieve goals.
examples: dedication, forward-thinking approach, and commitment to quality
unwavering determination

subcategories.name: Initiative & Ownership
subcategories.description: Recognizing individuals who take proactive steps, demonstrate ownership of tasks, and go the extra mile.
examples: take ownership of the problem
consistently stepped up

subcategories.name: Positive Attitude & Resilience
subcategories.description: Praise for maintaining a positive outlook, handling challenges with grace, and demonstrating resilience.
examples: always with a positive mindset
kindness and resilience shine so brightly

subcategories.name: Attention to Detail & Quality
subcategories.description: Acknowledging meticulousness, a focus on high-quality output, and thoroughness in work.
examples: attention to detail
commitment to quality

subcategories.name: Special Occasions & Milestones
subcategories.description: Recognition for personal life events and significant company or team achievements.

subcategories.name: Personal Life Events
subcategories.description: Acknowledging and celebrating significant personal milestones like birthdays or new arrivals.
examples: Congratulations on the arrival of your beautiful baby boy
Happy birthday

subcategories.name: Program & Award Achievements
subcategories.description: Celebrating completion of development programs or winning specific company awards.
examples: Leadership Development Program graduates
Best Overall Innovation Award

categories.reasoning: This taxonomy captures the core themes of recognition by categorizing them into how individuals contribute (Problem Solving, Collaboration, Project Delivery, Client Focus), their personal qualities (Leadership, Attributes), and specific events (Occasions). The subcategories provide granular detail on the specific actions and impacts being celebrated within each main theme, directly reflecting the language and sentiment found in the provided messages.
final_taxonomy.summary: No new categories met the frequency threshold. Phase 1 taxonomy used as-is.

examples: unwavering determination for education and your relentless pursuit of higher aims
excited to see all of things you achieve!

reasoning: This taxonomy captures the core themes of recognition by categorizing them into Problem Solving, Collaboration, Client Focus, Initiative, Leadership, Dedication, and Personal Milestones. These categories are derived directly from the recurring patterns and sentiments expressed in the award messages, avoiding generic HR jargon and reflecting the specific ways employees are valued within this dataset.
summary: No new categories met the frequency threshold. Phase 1 taxonomy used as-is.
